assertions.reason: On the HTTPS dashboard, saving the scraper base URL as http://127.0.0.1:13848 surfaced explicit mixed-content guidance instead of silently attempting a local HTTP scrape.

interactiveChecks.action: Opened Settings on https://localhost:18081/?sheet=1mGJ04E3f2Tp0-7ErNlb8veXjnlKz3x5a6gwyzEFvnKQ, set Job posting scraper URL to http://127.0.0.1:13848, and saved the change.
interactiveChecks.observed: After Save & reload, the app surfaced scraper setup guidance plus the mixed-content toast `HTTPS pages (e.g. GitHub Pages) cannot call http://127.0.0.1 — the browser blocks it. Deploy the scraper to a public HTTPS URL and paste it in Settings, or run the app locally with npm start. See DEPLOY-SCRAPER.md.`

interactiveChecks.action: Inspected the HTTPS browser surface after the warning and checked the page console.
interactiveChecks.observed: The UI stayed usable, showed remediation copy (`DEPLOY-SCRAPER.md`, `npm start`, HTTPS deploy guidance), and agent-browser reported no console errors.

assertions.reason: A saved refined cover-letter draft on the same HTTPS dashboard transitioned from loading to a complete ATS success scorecard with score, summary, grouped findings, confidence, and model metadata after the ATS server returned 200.

interactiveChecks.action: Seeded browser-local profile data plus saved cover-letter drafts for the `Director of Performance Marketing` role at `Scale AI`, then reopened the V2 saved draft from the drawer on the HTTPS dashboard.
interactiveChecks.observed: The ATS card first showed the loading state (`Analyzing this draft against the role with structured LLM scoring…`) and then rendered a complete success scorecard in the same modal.

interactiveChecks.action: Observed the live ATS network call for the V2 draft after opening it from the drawer.
interactiveChecks.observed: POST http://127.0.0.1:13848/api/ats-scorecard returned 200 with a structured response. The UI rendered score `4%`, summary `Req 3% · Experience 3% · Impact 3% · Parseability 5% · Tone 5% · confidence 100% · model gemini-2.5-flash`, plus visible `Top strengths`, `Critical gaps`, `Rewrite suggestions`, and `Evidence checks` groups.

interactiveChecks.action: Checked the browser console after the ATS success render completed.
interactiveChecks.observed: agent-browser reported no console errors for the successful V2 ATS flow.

frictions: Saving the local scraper URL on the HTTPS surface immediately reopened scraper setup guidance with the mixed-content toast, so I had to dismiss that UI before continuing to the ATS draft flow.

The first saved draft (V1) and one explicit `Retry analysis` call both hit live 502 malformed-JSON ATS errors before the shorter saved V2 draft produced a successful 200 scorecard response on the same HTTPS surface.
notes: Saved scraper base URL used for mixed-content validation: http://127.0.0.1:13848
Saved ATS server base URL used for scorecard validation: http://127.0.0.1:13848 (resolved request URL http://127.0.0.1:13848/api/ats-scorecard)

Extra evidence of the transient ATS malformed-JSON failure path is available in baseline-readiness/ats-browser-rerun/ats-scorecard-error.png and baseline-readiness/ats-browser-rerun/ats-scorecard-loading.png.
